superpowers.name: Repo Audit
superpowers.description: Audit live runtime paths and separate active behavior from stale config.
superpowers.prompt: Identify the live execution path before drawing conclusions. Prioritize prompt assembly, tool selection, context shaping, recovery logic, and session management.
superpowers.fallback: If execution is limited, focus on concrete runtime paths and avoid speculative architecture claims.

superpowers.name: Browser Grounding
superpowers.description: Prefer real browser evidence over memory for web and navigation tasks.
superpowers.prompt: Inspect the live page or search result before answering. Treat navigation as intermediate, not completion.
superpowers.fallback: If direct interaction is constrained, extract the cheapest grounding signal first and summarize confirmed facts only.

superpowers.name: Coding Execution
superpowers.description: Read code before changing it, keep edits targeted, and verify results after changes.
superpowers.prompt: Inspect the relevant implementation path, make targeted edits, and verify outcomes with tests or type checks when available.
superpowers.fallback: If editing is not available, produce a concrete change plan tied to exact files and runtime behavior.

superpowers.name: Code Review
superpowers.description: Review changes for bugs, regressions, and missing tests before summarizing.
superpowers.prompt: Lead with findings, cite concrete files or behaviors, and keep summary secondary to risk identification.
superpowers.fallback: If the full diff is unavailable, state the inspection gap explicitly and limit claims to observed files.
